  `title` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `brandName` varchar(256) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `thumbnailUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `imageUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `mediaUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `mediaType` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `headline` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `displayFormat` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `transcription` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `foreplayCreatedAt` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `isNew` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `syncedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `foreplay_creatives_foreplayAdId_unique` (`foreplayAdId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
